features.name: SQLite Database Schema
features.description: SQLAlchemy ORM models for users, projects, and tasks. Uses SQLite with file-based storage. Models: User (email, hashed_password, name), Project (name, description, owner_id), Task (title, description, project_id, assignee_id, status).

work_history.note: Validated: User, Project, Task models importable. All 3 model tests pass (test_models.py). SQLite with file-based storage confirmed.

features.completion_notes: Models importable, all 3 model tests pass, relationships defined

features.name: Frontend Project Setup
features.description: Next.js 14 app with Tailwind CSS. App Router structure with pages for login, register, dashboard, projects, and tasks. API client using axios with empty baseURL and Next.js rewrites to proxy /api/* to backend port 8000. Use next.config.mjs (not .ts).

work_history.note: Validated: NODE_ENV=production npm run build succeeds. All 9 routes built (/, /dashboard, /login, /register, /projects, /projects/new, /tasks, /tasks/new, /_not-found). api.ts uses empty baseURL. next.config.mjs present.

features.completion_notes: Production build succeeds. 9 static routes built. App Router structure with all required pages.

features.name: Health Check and App Config
features.description: GET /api/health returns {status: "healthy"}. Backend entry point at src/fixture/main.py.

work_history.note: Validated: GET /api/health returns {status: healthy, version: 1.0.0, ...}. test_health.py passes.

features.completion_notes: Health endpoint returns 200 with status healthy. test_health.py passes.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: POST /api/auth/register accepts {email, password, name}, creates user with bcrypt-hashed password, returns JWT. POST /api/auth/login validates credentials, returns {token}. GET /api/users/me returns current user profile. JWT middleware extracts user from Authorization: Bearer header.

work_history.note: Validated: POST /api/auth/register creates user with bcrypt hash, returns JWT. POST /api/auth/login validates and returns token. GET /api/users/me works. 7 auth tests pass.

features.completion_notes: Register, login, /users/me all working. JWT middleware enforced. 7 tests pass.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Overview page at /dashboard showing project and task counts with quick links.

work_history.note: Validated: frontend/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx exists. /dashboard route included in production build output (1.47 kB). Shows project/task counts with quick links.

features.completion_notes: Dashboard page exists and builds successfully. Overview page with project/task counts.

features.name: Navigation and Layout
features.description: Sidebar navigation with route highlighting and logout button. AuthGuard component protects authenticated routes. Layout component wraps all authenticated pages.

work_history.note: Validated: Sidebar.tsx, AuthGuard.tsx, Layout.tsx all exist in frontend/src/components/. Components used in authenticated pages. Build succeeds with all routes properly wrapped.

features.completion_notes: Sidebar, AuthGuard, Layout components all exist. Build includes all authenticated routes.

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Full CRUD for projects. POST /api/projects creates project with owner_id from auth. GET /api/projects lists user's projects. GET /api/projects/{id} returns single project. DELETE /api/projects/{id} removes project. Frontend pages: /projects (list), /projects/new (create form).

work_history.note: Validated: POST/GET/GET{id}/DELETE /api/projects all work. Auth enforced. Project isolation confirmed. 8 project tests pass. Frontend pages: /projects, /projects/new exist in build output.

features.completion_notes: Full CRUD working, auth enforced, isolation tested. 8 tests pass.

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Full CRUD for tasks with project assignment. POST /api/tasks creates task with project_id. GET /api/tasks lists user's tasks. DELETE /api/tasks/{id} removes task. Frontend pages: /tasks (list), /tasks/new (create form with project selector).

work_history.note: Validated: POST/GET/GET{id}/DELETE /api/tasks all work. Project assignment (project_id) confirmed. Auth enforced. Task isolation confirmed. 8 task tests pass. Frontend pages: /tasks, /tasks/new exist in build.

features.completion_notes: Full CRUD with project assignment working. 8 tests pass.
